title: capriola dactylon
intro: Capriola dactylon, commonly known as witch grass or black seed grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Capriola dactylon include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Capriola dactylon can be prepared as a herbal supplement in various forms, including capsules, teas, and oils, allowing for its benefits to be utilized in different ways.
